# Chatterbox

> The communication platform for everything important.

Chatterbox is a real-time communication platform that blends the best of Slack and Discord into one powerful workspace. It provides organized channels, direct messaging, video calls, and seamless collaboration for teams that move fast.

## Core Features

- **Workspaces (Boxes)**: Create isolated workspaces for your company, team, or community with invite codes and role-based access control.
- **Channels**: Organized text channels for focused conversations by topic, project, or team.
- **Direct Messages**: Private 1-on-1 messaging between workspace members.
- **Video Calls**: Built-in video calling powered by Daily.co with call codes for easy joining.
- **Real-time Messaging**: Instant message delivery via Supabase Realtime with presence indicators.
- **File Attachments**: Share images and files directly in conversations.
- **Role Management**: Owner, admin, and member roles with granular permissions.
- **Theming**: Light and dark mode support.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend**: Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, CSS Modules
- **Backend**: Supabase (Auth, Database, Realtime, Storage)
- **Video**: Daily.co
- **Payments**: Stripe

## Pricing

- **Free**: Up to 25 members, unlimited channels, 10,000 message history
- **Pro** ($8/member/month): Unlimited members, full message history, admin controls
- **Enterprise**: Custom pricing, SSO/SAML, 99.99% SLA

## Company

Built by Semloh Systems, based in Chicago, Illinois, USA.
